message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCC99
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #CCFF99
skinparam packageBorderColor #669933

class "FEDLCookChecker" as FEDLCookChecker {
  TMultiMap<FEDLNodeID, FName> ImportToImportingPackage
  TSet<FEDLNodeID> Exports
  TMultiMap<FEDLNodeID, FEDLNodeID> NodePrereqs
  --
  + AddImport()
  + AddExport()
  + AddArc()
}

class "FEDLNodeID" as FEDLNodeID {
  TArray<FName> ObjectPath
  --
  + GetTypeHash()
}

class "FUObjectThreadContext" as FUObjectThreadContext {
  TArray<FObjectInitializer> InitializerStack
  TRefCountPtr<FUObjectSerializeContext> SerializeContext
}

class "FObjectInitializer" as FObjectInitializer

class "FUObjectSerializeContext" as FUObjectSerializeContext {
  TArray<UObject*> ObjectsLoad
  TArray<FLonkerLoad*> AttachedLinkers
}

class "FPackageTracker" as FPackageTracker

class "CookRequests" as CookRequests

note right of FEDLNodeID
  ObjectPath 示例:
  Hash算法:
  基于FName的Hash, 注意Hash的末位是序列化标记
  <color:red>bDeplsSerialize</color>
end note

note right of FUObjectSerializeContext
  这个结构体缓存多个UObject序列化信息
end note

FEDLNodeID --|> FEDLCookChecker
FUObjectThreadContext "1:*" -- FObjectInitializer
FUObjectThreadContext "1:1" -- FUObjectSerializeContext

package "CookUtils" {
  FPackageTracker
  CookRequests
}

CookRequests -- FPackageTracker

@enduml
